headline: WRB Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher Premiums, Investment Income
summary: W.R. Berkley's Q2 results reflected premium growth, higher investment income and lower catastrophe losses, driving revenue growth and strong underwriting performance.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Underweight on WR Berkley, Raises Price Target to $68
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains WR Berkley (NYSE:WRB) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $67 to $68.

headline: WR Berkley Corp (WRB) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Investment Income and ...
summary: WR Berkley Corp (WRB) reports a 21% increase in operating earnings per share and record investment income, while navigating competitive pressures in the reinsurance segment.
